arts.sum: The forward is expected to leave in the New Year...

arts.ttl: “He wanted me there” – Player reveals manager wanted him at Crystal Palace, hints he’d have made transfer
arts.sum: Napoli midfielder Franck Zambo Anguissa has revealed Patrick Vieira wanted to sign him for Crystal Palace, and hinted he may have accepted the move because of the Frenchman. Corriere dello Sport cover comments from the midfielder today after he spoke on Radio CRC ahead of the clash with Vieira and his Genoa side on Saturday. The post “He wanted me there” – Player reveals manager wanted him at Crystal Palace, hints he’d have made transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Matchday warm-up: Every Palace League Cup quarter-final opponent
arts.sum: Crystal Palace make the trip across London to face Arsenal in the Carabao Cup quarter-finals on Wednesday night (18th December, 19:30 GMT) - so ahead of matchday get yourself warmed up with our cup themed quiz...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta 'corrects' reporter over Arsenal's record of one trophy in five years
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta took exception to suggestions that the Gunners have only won on trophy during his five years in charge of the club.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta channels inner Jose Mourinho with answer to Arsenal trophy question
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta guided the north London side to an FA Cup win over Chelsea just eight months after taking over at the Emirates but has not earned major silverware with the Gunners since

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta defends his Arsenal trophy record by highlighting their TWO Community Shield triumphs - as he insists Carabao Cup silverware can 'get the momentum going' for more
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The Carabao Cup presents Arteta with an opportunity to end his barren run as he flexed his two Community Shield triumphs alongside the 2020 FA Cup success.

arts.ttl: ‘Baffling’: Pundit says Mikel Arteta did something really ‘strange’ vs Everton on Saturday
arts.sum: Arsenal drew with Everton at the weekend in what was one of the most frustrating games of the Gunners’ season so far. Arsenal have had...

We look to reach the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup with Wednesday’s 7.30pm kick-off against Crystal Palace at Emirates Stadium. We were knocked out of the League Cup by Crystal Palace in a fourth round replay in 1970/71 but eliminated them 5-1 on aggregate in the 1992/93 semi-final before going on to lift the trophy that season.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues new Arsenal trophy vow and hits back over set-piece 'narrative'
arts.sum: Gunners head into Carabao Cup quarter-final clash against Crystal Palace struggling to score from open play
